# Daily Report — 2026-07-11

## Task Completed
Added `get_scheduled_job` and `get_on_call_rotation` tools to complete the list+get CRUD pattern for the `sysauto_script` and `cmn_rota` tables.

Both tools accept either a sys_id (32-char hex passthrough) or an exact name (name→sys_id resolver via a filtered GET). Each returns 404/empty-result guards and normalised reference fields. Registered in `system_administrator` and `full` packages in `tool_packages.yaml`, imported in `__init__.py`, and registered in `tool_utils.py`.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 2183
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes

New tests added: 34 (17 for each new tool covering resolver passthrough, name lookup, 404 guard, empty-result guard, HTTP error, connection error, missing params, missing instance_url, missing headers, URL construction, display_value flag, and reference field normalisation).

## Security
pip-audit found pre-existing vulnerabilities in system packages (setuptools, urllib3, wheel) unrelated to this project. No new vulnerabilities introduced.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/scheduled_job_tools.py` — added `GetScheduledJobParams`, `_resolve_scheduled_job_sys_id`, `get_scheduled_job`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/on_call_tools.py` — added `GetOnCallRotationParams`, `_resolve_on_call_rotation_sys_id`, `get_on_call_rotation`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — imported and exported both new tools
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — registered both new tools with descriptions
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added both tools to `system_administrator` and `full` packages
- `tests/test_scheduled_job_tools.py` — 17 new tests for `get_scheduled_job`
- `tests/test_on_call_tools.py` — 17 new tests for `get_on_call_rotation`

## Next Up
Add `create_change_schedule_span` (POST cmn_schedule_span) to allow defining new change window spans programmatically alongside the existing list/get tools.
